trajectory_goal: Use GPT-5.4 to expand B2 with reusable 2Wiki compositional, bridge-comparison, and inference retrieval skills before later trajectory generation and SFT.
notes: B3 should preserve the useful B1 and B2 single-hop and hotpot-style multihop spine while adding stronger compositional and relation-chain retrieval skills supported by 2Wiki.
New compositional skills should improve longer relation chains, bridge-comparison hybrids, and inference-style retrieval without destabilizing easier bridge questions.
Prefer additions or targeted refinements that improve routing, chain decomposition, evidence alignment, or stop conditions in reusable ways.
